## Summary

What does this PR change?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New predicate
- [ ] Policy data update (e.g. add/remove a country in `countries.json`)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI / release pipeline
- [ ] Other

## If this is a policy data update — compliance fields

> Skip this section if this PR doesn't touch a `countries.json`,
> `states.json`, or `sources.md` file.

- **Policy**:
- **Change requested**: (added X / removed Y / corrected Z)
- **Primary source URL**:
- **Effective date**:
- **Reviewer**: @ &lt;compliance-reviewer-name&gt;
- **Per-policy CHANGELOG.md updated**: yes / no

## Test plan

- [ ] Tests added / updated for the changed behaviour
- [ ] `swift test` passes
- [ ] `./gradlew test` passes
- [ ] SPDX-header lint passes
- [ ] Data-file parity check passes (if data files were touched)
